creator: metalberserk@hotmail.fr
text:
so i would install freebsd 9.1 on my virtual machine. And i got a segmentation fault when i typed on "c" or "w"

How-To-Repeat: 
To get this segmentation fault, follow this steps when you want to install FreeBSD:

#sysinstall so i would install freebsd 9.1 on my virtual machine. And i got a segmentation fault

Select "Standard" for the installation, press "Ok".
Delete all the partition to get only one partition "unused"
press "A"
Select "Standard Install a standard MBR"
press "OK"
And now you can get the window "FreeBSD Disklabel Editor"
press "C" or "W".
and there is a segmentation fault.
